---
title: 'Tweet From DarrellWolfe January 06, 2014 at 10:16AM'
date: '2014-01-06T16:35:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2911125391760814381'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/tweet-from-darrellwolfe-january-06-2014.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Twitter'
---

<div xmlns='http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml'><blockquote class='twitter-tweet'><br /><p>"But what if I fail?" You will. A better question might be, "after I fail, what then?"<br /> <a href='http://t.co/0cAnAbETwW'>http://t.co/0cAnAbETwW</a> <a href='https://twitter.com/search?q=%23DW&amp;src=hash'>#DW</a> </p><br />— Darrell G Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href='https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/statuses/420227289197326336'>January 6, 2014</a> </blockquote><br /><script type='text/javascript' charset='utf-8' src='//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js' async=''><br /></script><br/><br /><br/><br />January 06, 2014 at 10:16AM<br/><br />via <a href='https://ifttt.com/?ref=da&amp;site=blogger'>IFTTT</a></div>
